children.heading: Capital distribution of balance of loan fund
children.label: a Capital distribution of balance of loan fund

children.text: The Secretary shall first be paid an amount which bears the same ratio to such balance in such fund on the date of termination of the fund as the total amount of the Federal capital contributions to such fund by the Secretary pursuant to bears to the total amount in such fund derived from such Federal capital contributions and from funds deposited therein pursuant to .section 297a(b)(2)(A) of this titlesection 297a(b)(2)(B) of this title
The remainder of such balance shall be paid to the school.

children.heading: Payment of principal or interest on loans
children.label: b Payment of principal or interest on loans
children.text: If a capital distribution is made under subsection (a), the school involved shall, after such capital distribution, pay to the Secretary, not less often than quarterly, the same proportionate share of amounts received by the school in payment of principal or interest on loans made from the loan fund established under as determined by the Secretary under subsection (a).section 297a(b) of this title

children.heading: Payment of balance of loan fund
children.label: c Payment of balance of loan fund

children.text: Within 90 days after the termination of any agreement with a school under or the termination in any other manner of a school’s participation in the loan program under this part, such school shall pay to the Secretary from the balance of the loan fund of such school established under , an amount which bears the same ratio to the balance in such fund on the date of such termination as the total amount of the Federal capital contributions to such fund by the Secretary pursuant to bears to the total amount in such fund on such date derived from such Federal capital contributions and from funds deposited in the fund pursuant to . The remainder of such balance shall be paid to the school.section 297a of this title1section 297a of this titlesection 297a(b)(2)(A) of this titlesection 297a(b)(2)(B) of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

A school to which paragraph (1) applies shall pay to the Secretary after the date on which payment is made under such paragraph and not less than quarterly, the same proportionate share of amounts received by the school after the date of termination referred to in paragraph (1) in payment of principal or interest on loans made from the loan fund as was determined for the Secretary under such paragraph.
